name: yaver-web-headless
description: Headless surrogate for the Yaver web dashboard — drive dev-server preview (Vite / Next / Expo / Flutter), webview reload, vibing, reconnect, repair-relay, and guest/OAuth auth over Convex + relay from Node/Bun scripts, CLI, or MCP.

scripts.build: bun build src/bin/cli.ts --outdir dist --target node --minify && bun build src/web-client.ts --outdir dist --target node && node scripts/fix-shebang.mjs
